name: Christian Rupprecht
title: Associate Professor of Computer Science
bio: I am an Associate Professor of Computer Science at the University of Oxford and one of the leads of the Visual Geometry Group (VGG). My research focuses on computer vision and machine learning, particularly 3D reconstruction, generative models, and visual understanding. I received my PhD in 2018 from the Technical University of Munich. My work has received multiple awards, including two Best Paper Awards at CVPR. I am also Chief Research Officer at Third Dimension AI, a company building spatial generation technologies at the intersection of 3D and world modelling.
